case_title: SOUTH, RANDAL VS COULTER, DAVID A. PRESIDENT & CEO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUTH, RANDAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COULTER, DAVID A. PRESIDENT & CEO BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL TRUST & SAVINGS ASSOC. DEFENDANT, COULTER, DAVID A, PRESIDENT & CEO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DAVID COULTER PRESIDENT & CEO B/A NATL.TRUST & SAVINGS ASSOC. RETURNED REFUSED;
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COULTER, DAVID A. PRESIDENT & CEO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY BANK OF AMERICA KAY GRAVES FILED. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER. $10.00 FEE PAID.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOUTH, RANDAL AS TO DEFENDANT COULTER, DAVID A. PRESIDENT & CEO BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL TRUST & SAVINGS ASSOC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-29-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM BANK OF AMERICA FILED;
